svg.aria-label: PFC FADT workflow on supported platforms: reserve lossless headroom and assign a PFC profile to a priority group; calculate a dynamic threshold from shared-buffer availability; assert and deassert PFC using the dynamic threshold. General FADT is documented from EOS 4.22.0F and PFC FADT configuration from EOS 4.35.0F.
svg.text: PFC FADT: EOS 4.35.0F+ on supported platforms

g.text: Reserve headroom and assign a PFC profile
Calculate a threshold from shared-buffer availability
Assert or deassert PFC using the dynamic threshold
bind an interface and PFC priority to the supported buffer policy
available shared resources influence the instantaneous limit
pause behavior adapts as buffer availability changes

svg.text: Effect: more efficient shared-buffer use and fairer lossless behavior
